textByHashes.c3be89889898063247423ee276cf0fc13c466abc: Ah, it's good to be on board a ship again! No matter how long I live on land, a ship will always seem better. Are you ready to depart?
textByHashes.1fcaa1e6f39358f2da18d841b543734f8eba02e6: Well, you go do whatever you need to do. I'll wait here for you until you're ready.
textByHashes.0acfd5f4ede0b0b1275fa351406d43d7b2c3539d: Ah, it's good to feel the salt spray on my face once again!
textByHashes.361daa66b0bdba952209a2482b9d0bcc212a327c: And this is a mighty fine ship. She don't look much, but she handles like a dream.
textByHashes.40bf51a5a58497b3a4523ccb8e03f6d8b3eb0373: Not long now! According to the chart, we'd be able to see Crandor if it wasn't for those clouds on the horizon.
textByHashes.5a272f45cca5a9e9ad9e03402af671f63fa00e04: Oh, well. The weather had been so good up until now.
textByHashes.e8c6297238aaec3ad6af8644d261d1a1d1665b35: Now I see why all the other captains said I'd be mad to go near Crandor. It looks like we're stranded.
textByHashes.a9b0ae835429d1e6401253c79ed1212935bf856c: Oh, that's good. I'll be able to get back to Draynor somehow,
textByHashes.0f98ffe0c9c73d0752cb78735771f4d37c5b56ef: if I can sneak past all the skeletons and demons on this island!
